results.rendered_html:
rocaka (wie eben)
1〉 adj. = rocana  MED. n. 116. fg.  Appetit machend  SUŚR. 1,200,13 . a˚ den Appetit benehmend  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 129,a,12 .
— 2〉 m.
a〉 Appetit, Hunger  H. 393 .
— b〉 eine den Durst (den Appetit) reizende Speise, = avadaṃśa  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— c〉 Bez. verschiedener Pflanzen: Musa sapientum  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.  eine Zwiebelart (rājapalāṇḍu)  RĀJAN. ebend.  = granthiparṇabheda  BHĀVAPR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— d〉 ein Verfertiger von unächten Schmucksachen  R. 2,83,14 . = kācakupyādikartar  KATAKA. 
— Vgl. a˚, kajjala˚.

results.rendered_html:
rocaka a. [ruc-ṇvul]
1 Brightening, enlightening.
2 Pleasant, agreeable.
3 Exciting appetite.
— kaṃ
1 Hunger.
2 Any medicine serving as a tonic or restoring lost appetite, a stimulant, tonic.
3 A worker in glass or artificial ornament.
4 The plantain.
